subcodes.first_line: O Manifestation of Tribulations! In the sacred tradition it is recorded: "When God loveth a servant, He doth test him." Though thou art physically infirm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مظهر بلایاء در حدیث وارد اذا احب الله عبدا ابتلاه تو اگر جسما علیل و
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @thankfulness; gratitude, @consolation and comfort
